✦ Challenge Yourself ✦

Tarot Bingo

Complete tarot practice challenges to mark your squares. Get five in a row — horizontally, vertically, or diagonally — and shout BINGO!

Tarot Bingo

Complete tarot challenges to mark your squares. Get 5 in a row to win!

B
I
N
G
O

Mark squares as you complete challenges!

0 squares marked

✨ BINGO! ✨

You got 5 in a row! You're a fearless tarot explorer!

How to Play

1️⃣

Complete a tarot challenge listed on the card in your daily practice.

2️⃣

Click the square on the card to mark it as complete.

3️⃣

Get 5 in a row — horizontal, vertical, or diagonal — to win!

4️⃣

The FREE SPACE in the center is always marked. Your progress saves automatically.

✦ The Fearless Tarot ✦

A mystical journey through the 78 cards of wisdom. Trust your intuition, embrace the archetypes, and read fearlessly.
